gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/189)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/189)
text: هُ قَالَ شَكَا نَبِيٌّ مِنَ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ الْغَمَّ فَأَمَرَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِأَكْلِ الْعِنَبِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Bakr Bin Salih,

(It has been narrated) raising it from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A Prophet<sup>as</sup> from the Prophets<sup>as</sup> complained to Allah<sup>as</sup> Mighty and Majestic of the gloom, so Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Commanded him<sup>as</sup> with eating the grapes’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Bakr ibn Salih in a marfu ‘ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One of the Prophets complained before Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, about sadness and Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, commanded him to eat grapes.’”
